params.brief: A professional woman in a navy blazer gives a corporate interview in a bright modern office, medium close-up, speaking to camera
params.line: Our new product launches this Friday, and we could not be more excited about it.
params.speaker: woman in a navy blazer

params.brief: A red ceramic coffee mug with a white mountain logo printed on it, steam rising from the coffee, sitting on a rustic wooden desk next to an open silver laptop, camera slowly pans left to right, warm morning light
Close-up of a street magician's hands smoothly shuffling and fanning a deck of playing cards, cafe interior background, shallow depth of field
Two people sit across a kitchen table in daylight: a bearded man in a maroon vest and a woman in a denim jacket; the man delivers a line, the woman nods
params.line: The shipment arrives tomorrow at nine.
params.speaker: bearded man in a maroon vest

params.brief: A golden retriever runs along a wide sandy beach at sunrise, kicking up sand, gentle waves rolling in, cinematic side tracking shot, warm golden light
